DISCOVERY 612, PLAINTIFF PERSOLVE, LLC'S MOTION FOR AN ORDER DEEMING ADMITTED PLAINTIFF'S REQUESTS FOR ADMISSIONS IS DENIED. MOTIONS TO DEEM ADMITTED REQUESTS FOR ADMISSION CANNOT BE HEARD ON SHORTENED TIME. [SEE DEMYER V. COSTA MESA MOBILE HOME ESTATES (1995) 36 CAL.APP.4TH 393, DISAPPROVED ON OTHER GROUNDS.] COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

calendar.matters:
COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Dec-17-2007 Dismissal - No Appearance

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Dec-17-2007 Assigned To Trial Court

Notice Of Motion And Motion For An Order Deeming Admitted Matters For Which Admissions Were Sought Through Request For Admissions
Off Calendar Dec-12-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Jennifer Tachera, Esq., appeared for plaintiff & moving party: Persolve, LLC

No other appearance. Tentative ruling adopted: Plaintiff Persolve, LLC's Motion For An Order Deeming Admitted Plaintiff's Requests For Admissions is denied. Motions to deem admitted requests for admission cannot be heard on shortened time. [See Demyer v. Costa Mesa Mobile Home Estates (1995) 36 Cal.App.4th 393, disapproved on other grounds.] COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Deft'S Responses To Form Interrogatories;
Off Calendar Dec-12-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Jennifer Tachera, Esq., appeared for plaintiff & moving party: Persolve, LLC

No other appearance. Tentative ruling adopted: Plaintiff Persolve, LLC's Motion To Compel Defendant's Responses To Form Interrogatories is granted. Defendant is ordered to respond on or before December 14, 2007. Plaintiff's request for sanctions is denied. The motions are being heard pursuant to the court's order allowing them to be heard on this date. Plaintiff's request for sanctions is denied. Order signed in open court. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Deft'S Responses To Request For Production Of Documents And Tanglible Things;
Off Calendar Dec-12-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Jennifer Tachera, Esq., appeared for plaintiff & moving party: Persolve, LLC

No other appearance. Tentative ruling adopted: Plaintiff Persolve, LLC's Motion To Compel Defendant's Responses To Request For Production Of Documents And Tangible Things is granted. Defendant is ordered to respond and to produce documents on or before December 14, 2007. Plaintiff's request for sanctions is denied. The motions are being heard pursuant to the court's order allowing them to be heard on this date. Plaintiff's request for sanctions is denied. Order signed in open court. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
